But what we're pointing here, pointing towards here is linking their candidacy to join this program with their ability and readiness to achieve the results within it. And that's the point we're really going after here. So point number one, this is where we point out the person just getting started. So here we write, you're just getting started with your list building efforts and want to make sure you absolutely nail it right out of the gates by using only the most powerful, easy to follow what's working now, list building strategies. Simple enough. Number two is going to be for the people or the person who's been struggling for a long time. And I love having these two people right next to each other because a person doing it for the first time reads bullet number one and then sees later that they're actually in a great position to do it and not endure the pains of the person who's been struggling for a while. So number two, you've been trying to build your list for months or even years, but haven't attracted the numbers you were hoping for currently less than 2,500. And the people you do have on your list are mostly disengaged freebie seekers who pull a disappearing act whenever you have the courage to make an offer. So right there with points number one and two, we pretty much have full coverage of the circumstances of our ideal client. And with that said, we can move to number three and point out a little aspect of exclusive empowerment. So nothing too crazy, but just a little pat on the back for something they've already accomplished. So here we chose, you already know who your audience is. Sure you may make some small tweaks as you go through List Builders Lab, but for the most part you know who you're serving and have a good idea about how you want to serve them. So this is both a little pat on the back for people who've already done this work and a little opportunity for them to cash in on those experience points or privilege points, however we want to frame that, but it's also a very real aspect of who Amy is able to serve in this program. This is where we're going to point to a desirable trait. So you have no problem investing a couple hours per week as long as you know that every bit of energy you invest is a strategic and meaningful step forward in owning a profitable and consistently growing email list. And then we're going to back that up with facts. So in fact, you already are investing time and energy doing things like writing epic blog posts, designing lead magnets, dropping truth bombs on social media and other things you keep hearing you need to be doing. Only problem is without a clear strategy that ties them all together, you've experienced nothing but discouraging why the heck do I even bother results followed by crippling overwhelm around what to do next. Now the two points we used here as far as them already investing a couple of hours per week and proving how they're doing it, that's a pretty universal thing to point towards in most products. And I suggest you really try to use those two in combination because what it does is it really heightens and reveals how committed they already are towards generating that outcome or overcoming the problem. You know, you're not asking them to move towards this goal that of your choosing. You're showing that they're already active in it. They're already struggling with it. They're already wasting resources, whatever that looks like in pursuit of it. And now you're going to give them a chance to just keep, keep expending those efforts which is doing so more skillfully and with better results. Finally, not finally, but moving forward, we point towards a key USP around the product and their fear in, you know, going for products that don't have that USP. So you care about what's working in 2017, 2018 and beyond. You get skeptical when others start dishing out list building advice that may have worked for them back in 2014 when the rules of the game were different and the world was less noisy. That's why you appreciate how List Builders Lab teaches you how to use the most current strategies that the experts use.
